parsed_output.justification: The discussion shows Paul consistently deflecting blame and claiming various roles, yet no one else convincingly proves a werewolf identity. The Seer’s claim of seeing a werewolf is contradicted by later statements that no werewolf was seen, suggesting the Seer was misled or lying. Paul’s accusations against others and his attempts to shift suspicion point to him being the lone werewolf trying to survive. Eliminating Paul maximizes the chance of removing the only werewolf in the game.
